evals.prompt: can you set up web/lib/money.ts for clearcontract? needs the pence formatting stuff and computeQuoteTotals like the plan describes. the plan is in clearcontract_project_plan.md
evals.expected_output: money.ts with integer-pence functions (lineTotal, computeQuoteTotals, cashDiscount, feeSurcharge) matching plan §5.1 math, unit tests included in the same change, terse report at the end

evals.prompt: add a quote status helper in web/lib/status.ts — something that tells me if a transition is allowed (draft->sent etc). follow the plan's status machine
evals.expected_output: status.ts implementing exactly the transitions from plan §3.12 (including expired/changes_requested edges), table-style tests covering allowed AND forbidden transitions, terse report

evals.prompt: the formatPence function should show negative amounts like -£1.50 not £-1.50, can you fix it
evals.expected_output: minimal targeted fix with a regression test, verification run, report of only 1-3 lines with no headings or explanation padding
